name: x402engine
description: 76 pay-per-call APIs for AI agents — 44 LLM models, image generation (FLUX, Ideogram, Nano Banana 2), voice cloning TTS (Lux, OpenAI, ElevenLabs), code execution, audio transcription, crypto market data, blockchain analytics, ENS resolution, IPFS storage, web search, and travel search. Supports USDC on Base/Solana and USDm on MegaETH.
